metadata.title: Enterprise Data Platform Migration Architecture
metadata.description: Complete migration from Oracle/Snowflake to Databricks

requirements.description: Business must reduce total cost of ownership for data platform by 40% over 3 years through consolidation and automation
Platform must support both real-time streaming analytics and batch analytics for video streaming metrics
System must maintain 99.9% data availability during migration period with no data loss
Data teams need unified platform combining data engineering, data science, and analytics workloads
Business requires seamless user experience with zero planned downtime during migration
Organization needs scalable architecture supporting 10x data growth from 100TB to 1PB over 3 years
Compliance team requires complete data lineage tracking and audit trails for GDPR and CCPA compliance
Leadership needs migration completed within 12 months with clear Q1-Q4 milestones
System shall support bidirectional synchronization between Oracle/Snowflake and Databricks with conflict resolution
System shall automatically discover and map schemas from Oracle/Snowflake to Databricks Delta Lake format
System shall validate data integrity through row count reconciliation and checksum validation after each migration batch
System shall provide automated rollback capability to previous stable state within 15 minutes
System shall support incremental migration in waves with table-level granularity and parallel execution
System shall deliver query response time under 5 seconds for 95th percentile of analytical queries
System shall efficiently handle datasets exceeding 100TB with columnar storage and optimization
System shall support 500+ concurrent users with workload isolation and auto-scaling
System shall process streaming data with end-to-end latency under 60 seconds for 99% of events
System shall automatically scale compute clusters from 2 to 200 nodes based on workload demand
System shall provide elastic cloud storage scaling from 100TB to 1PB+ with automatic tiering
System shall enforce granular RBAC at table, column, and row level with dynamic data masking for PII
System shall automatically detect and classify PII data using ML-based scanning
System shall capture and visualize end-to-end data lineage with column-level tracking
System shall perform automated incremental backups every 6 hours with point-in-time recovery
System shall meet disaster recovery SLA with RPO under 1 hour and RTO under 4 hours
System shall provide real-time monitoring of data pipelines with alerts for failures and SLA breaches
System shall track data quality metrics with automated anomaly detection and root cause analysis
System shall track cloud costs by workload and team with optimization recommendations
System shall enforce encryption at rest using AES-256 and encryption in transit using TLS 1.3
System shall integrate with enterprise SSO (SAML/OAuth2) and enforce MFA for privileged access
System shall preserve data types, constraints, and indexes during schema conversion with 100% fidelity
System shall achieve minimum 3:1 compression ratio using Delta Lake and columnar storage
System shall support active-active deployment across multiple AWS regions for disaster recovery
System shall enforce rate limiting of 1000 requests/min per client with throttling
System shall support event-driven integration using Kafka with at-least-once delivery guarantees
System shall enforce configurable data retention policies with automated deletion after 7 years
System shall maintain centralized schema registry with versioning and compatibility checks
System shall support end-to-end ML pipelines with feature stores, model training, and serving
System shall refresh BI dashboards in under 10 seconds for 95% of queries
System shall support infrastructure-as-code deployment with automated provisioning
System shall automatically detect and recover from transient failures within 5 minutes
System shall support canary deployments with automated rollback on failure detection
System shall enforce automated unit, integration, and data quality tests before production deployment

traces.rationale: Incremental migration waves reduce TCO by enabling phased decommissioning
Cost tracking and optimization directly supports TCO reduction goals
Query response time requirement enables real-time analytics capability
Streaming latency requirement supports real-time analytics
Data validation framework ensures availability during migration
Automated backup/recovery ensures high availability
Concurrent user support enables unified platform for data teams
Bidirectional sync enables zero downtime migration
Auto-scaling compute supports 10x growth
Elastic storage addresses 100TB to 1PB scalability
RBAC provides access control for compliance
Complete data lineage enables required audit trails
Automated schema mapping accelerates migration timeline
Conflict Resolver implements bidirectional sync
Schema Converter automates schema mapping
Data Validator performs integrity validation
ETL Orchestrator includes rollback functionality
SQL Analytics Engine provides fast query response
Delta Lake Storage handles 100TB+ datasets
Databricks Lakehouse supports 500+ concurrent users
Streaming Pipeline Engine delivers low latency
Databricks Platform provides auto-scaling
Delta Lake on S3 provides elastic storage
Access Control Manager enforces RBAC
Access Control Manager includes PII detection
Lineage Tracker captures complete lineage
Delta Lake provides automated backups
Observability Platform provides monitoring
Data Quality Engine tracks quality metrics
Cost Optimizer tracks and optimizes costs
Delta Lake Storage provides DR capability through automated backups, cross-region replication (RPO <1hr, RTO <4hr), deployed on AWS multi-AZ infrastructure (PA-CLOUD-001)
ETL Orchestrator supports incremental wave-based migration with table-level granularity and parallel execution up to 100 concurrent jobs (deployed on PA-MIG-001)
Delta Lake Storage implements AES-256 encryption at rest on S3
Access Control Manager enforces TLS 1.3 for all communications
Access Control Manager integrates with SSO/SAML and enforces MFA
Schema Converter preserves data types with 100% fidelity via validateSchemaMapping()
Delta Lake achieves 3:1 compression via compactFiles() and columnar Parquet
Databricks Lakehouse supports multi-region active-active deployment
API Gateway enforces rate limiting via rateLimitAPI() function
Streaming Pipeline Engine integrates with Kafka for event-driven architecture
Audit Logger enforces 7-year retention policy via ensureImmutability()
Metadata Manager provides schema registry via versionMetadata()
ML Workspace supports end-to-end ML pipelines via trackExperiments() and serveModels()
SQL Analytics Engine delivers 10s dashboard refresh via cacheResults()
Workflow Orchestrator supports IaC deployment via scheduleWorkflows()
Observability Platform enables self-healing via detectAnomalies() and automated remediation
Workflow Orchestrator supports canary deployments with retryFailedTasks()
Data Quality Engine enforces automated testing via enforceRules() and checkQuality()
